reviews.review_description: A fun little simple racer, easy enough to control and I liked the look of it all.
I just want PS4 controller support

The graphical style may be off-putting to some people, but thanks to it this runs absolutely smooth on Quest. Handles a bit like Dirt Rally, though of course only fake handling with no real physics or even jumps. Still something great can come out of this demo eventually... hopefully multiplayer but I know few will be able to handle this without barfing... but keep it up, it's a blast for those who can.
I absolutely love the feel of this game but wasn’t able to find the full version anywhere. Would love to see a full release with more maps, cars and possibly soundtracks.
